ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie in USD */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie in USD */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes the movie has received */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit of the movie in USD */,
  "profit_percentage" REAL /* Profit percentage of the movie */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer(s) */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or slogan of the movie */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Content rating (e.g., PG, R) */,
  "marketing_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for marketing and promotion */,
  "box_office_opening_weekend" REAL /* Revenue generated during the opening weekend */,
  "international_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from international markets */,
  "domestic_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from domestic markets */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of production */,
  "post_production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of post-production */,
  "release_window" TEXT /* Time between the end of production and the release date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the genre is associated with */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  "genre_popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the country is associated with */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the production country */,
  "country_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the country */,
  "country_population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "country_gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_countries_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spoken_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the language is associated with */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the spoken language */,
  "language_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the language */,
  "language_population" INTEGER /* Number of speakers of the language */,
  "language_script" TEXT /* Script used for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spoken_languages_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the cast member is associated with */,
  "cast_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the cast member */,
  "character_role" TEXT /* Role of the character (e.g., lead, supporting) */,
  "character_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "actor_popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the crew member is associated with */,
  "crew_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the crew member */,
  "crew_member_role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., lead, supporting) */,
  "crew_member_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the crew member */,
  "crew_member_experience" TEXT /* Experience level of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_crew_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, director, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., production, marketing, finance) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
